messages.content: Hello, how can I assist you today?

OMRAN AL-MEZEINI
Al Khoud · 92345085
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> · LinkedIn Profile · Twitter/Blog/Portfolio

I am an experienced civil engineer with five years of experience in building inspection, road and drainage project management, and maintenance engineering services. With a Master’s degree in Civil Engineering and Construction Management and a strong understanding of construction codes and regulations, I am committed to quality, safety, and environmental standards. A proactive problem-solver and effective communicator, I am able to collaborate with stakeholders to meet project objectives.  I am confident that I can contribute to any organization’s success.
EXPERIENCE
NOVEMBER 2022 – CURRENTLY  
CIVIL ENGINEER, MAINTENANCE DEPARTMENT, MUSCAT MUNICIPALITY
Responsibilities: 
•	Plan and manage the maintenance and repair of public and municipal infrastructure elements.
•	Ensure that maintenance projects are completed on time and within budget.
•	Develop and implement maintenance programs, schedules, and checklists.
•	Supervise maintenance staff and contractors.
•	Evaluate and recommend improvements in maintenance processes and procedures.
•	 Ensure compliance with safety regulations and standards. 
DECEMBER 2021 – NOVEMBER 2022  
ROAD PROJECT EGINEER, ROADS AND LIGHTENING DEPARTMENT, MUSCAT MUNICIPALITY  
Responsibilities: 
•	Develop and manage road projects to meet the needs of local communities.
•	Conduct site investigations for new projects.
•	Oversee contractors and consultants during the planning and construction phase of projects.
•	Manage water stagnation projects to improve water drainage flow systems.
•	Ensure strict compliance with environmental and safety regulations.
•	Conduct site inspections and quality control checks.
•	Collaborate with other municipal departments and external agencies to meet project objectives.


JUNE 2018 – DECEMBER 2021
BUILDING INSPECTION ENGINEER, TECHNICAL INSPECTION DEPARTMENT, MUSCAT MUNICIPALITY 
Responsibilities:
•	Conducted thorough inspections of the construction site activities from (excavations, footing and retaining wall, plinth beam, ground, first, second, penthouse, etc. floor slab) to ensure compliance with approved drawings, specification and safety regulations. 
•	Reviewed building plans, drawings, and specifications to verify compliance with local codes, ordinances, and regulations.
•	Communicate with contractors, project managers and consultants to resolve issues; and provide technical and official support. 
•	Issued construction permit for new, minor, major and demolish of building. 
•	Approved project completion certificate and release permissions for project insurance.      
ACHIEVEMENT
•	Authorized head of maintenance section. 
•	Authorized head of roads and lightening section for about two months.  
•	Successfully managed construction of proposed solution to resolve storm water stagnation in Walyt Seeb with more than [615 000 OR] in project value.
•	Displayed strong team work in construction of  10 Km internal roads depending on self-effort of road section to achieve minimum cost value reach to half of the actual price.
•	Implemented effective procedures for building inspections that promoted streamlined processes and contributed towards better compliance.  
EDUCATION
NOVEMBER 2017
MASTER OF CIVIL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, HERIOT-WATT UNIVERSITY, UK
•	MSc Dissertation Project: Experimental investigation of RC column behavior under impact loading. (Achieved result: A).
•	Upgrading a combined sewerage system of Buckie town in Scotland.



JUNE 2016
BACHELOR OF CIVIL ENGINEERING, HERIOT-WATT UNIVERSITY, UK
•	BEng Dissertation Project: Assessment of RC structural elements using alternative assessment methods. 
•	Structural Design Project in corporate with AECOM company to design a full roadway bridge located in North Ireland.
CERTIFICATIONS & COURSES
•	OCT 2019	Project management-based Primavera P6 (120hrs) at TUV SUD Middle East
•	SEP 2019	Introduction to HSE (25hrs) at Oman Technology Institute
•	JUN 2019	Information Technology (100hrs) at Oman Technology Institute 
•	MAY 2019	Business Communication (88hrs) at Oman Technology Institute 
•	MAY 2019	English Language (80hrs) at Oman Technology Institute 
•	DEC 2017	IOSH Certificate at JD institute
•	OCT 2017	Course classes of NEBOSH IGC at JD institute
•	OCT 2017	Course classes of IOSH MANAGING SAFELY at JD institute
•	OCT 2017	Risk Assessment Certificate at JD institute 
•	AUG 2014	AutoCAD Draftsman at Arabian Centre
Thank you for providing your resume. Is there anything specific you would like me to do with it?

Sure, here's my feedback on your resume:

Firstly, your resume looks organized and easy to read. You have used clear section headings and bullet points to highlight your skills, accomplishments and work experience. 

Your professional summary is effective in summarizing your skills and experience in a concise manner. However, I would recommend you to tailor this summary to the job you are applying for so that it stands out among other candidates for the same role. 

You have provided relevant details of your work experience and accomplishments using bullet points under each job listing, which is helpful for the reader to quickly understand your achievements. I like how you have highlighted your achievements in each job listing.

In terms of education, you have provided the necessary information and relevant course details. 

Lastly, you have included details of certifications and courses, which is helpful for the hiring manager to understand your additional skills and qualifications.

Overall, your resume looks great and it showcases your skills and experience effectively. Good job!
can you suggest skills based on my resume

Sure, based on your resume, some of the skills that you possess are:

1. Project management
2. Maintenance engineering
3. Building inspection
4. Road and drainage projects management
5. Compliance with safety regulations and standards
6. Strong understanding of construction codes and regulations
7. Quality control
8. Site inspections
9. Collaboration with stakeholders
10. Problem-solving
11. Effective communication 

You can highlight these skills in your resume, and tailor them to the job you are applying for. Additionally, you can consider obtaining certifications in project management or other relevant skills, which may help you in landing a job in your field.
what is your best recommendation for the summary

As an AI language model, I cannot provide an opinion or recommendation, but I can suggest a possible revised summary based on your previous description:

"Results-driven Civil Engineer with five years of experience in building inspection, maintenance engineering, and road and drainage project management. Possesses a Master’s Degree in Civil Engineering and Construction Management, and a strong understanding of construction codes and regulations. Skilled in planning and managing maintenance and repair services, and ensuring timely completion of projects within budget, while prioritizing quality, safety, and environmental standards. A proactive problem-solver adept at collaborating with stakeholders, and ensuring compliance with safety regulations and standards." 

However, this is a suggestion and I encourage you to tailor your summary to the specific role you are applying to and highlight the skills and experiences that are most relevant to the job requirements.
can you give examples for volunteer experience

Sure, here are some examples of volunteer experience that you might want to consider:

1. Volunteering at a local charity organization such as a food bank or homeless shelter. Duties may include distributing food or supplies, providing customer service, or helping with general maintenance.

2. Mentoring young people or adults who may need help with their studies or navigating their career paths. This can include tutoring or coaching.

3. Volunteering at an animal shelter or animal rescue organization. Duties may include caring for animals, assisting in adoption events, or fundraising activities.

4. Participating in a community-building project such as a park cleanup or a neighborhood watch program.

5. Serving as a volunteer at an event or festival. Duties may include ticket sales, setup or teardown, or providing event attendees with assistance or information.

6. Working with an organization that supports the elderly or disabled. Duties may include visiting with people who are alone, helping with activities, or providing transportation.

7. Volunteering in disaster response or emergency management organizations. Duties may include preparedness planning or responding to emergencies and crises.

These are just a few examples, but there are many other ways to gain volunteer experience depending on your interests and availability.

rewrite this in a perfect way which express one of my volunteering work ''Supervising construction of Wadi Bagol Dam In Saham town which funded by local community in Mahab Village and other donators; and designed and consulted by Ministry of Agriculture, Fisheries Wealth & Water Resources ''

As an assistant language model, I would suggest the following revised sentence that expresses your volunteer work more concisely:

"I supervised the construction of Wadi Bagol Dam in Saham town, designed and consulted by the Ministry of Agriculture, Fisheries Wealth & Water Resources, and funded by the local community in Mahab Village and other donors."

This sentence clearly states your role as a supervisor and the funding and design of the project, while also being concise and easy to read.

rewrite this in perfect words with correction of grammar: •	I supervised the construction of Wadi Bagol Dam in Saham town, designed and consulted by the Ministry of Agriculture, Fisheries Wealth & Water Resources, and funded by the local community in Mahab Village and other donors. 
•	Supervised construction of community services such as Multiuse General Majlas, Mosque and maintenance of Falajs in the Mahab village. 
•	Participating in construction of three football pitch to Mahab Sports and Cultural Team  which fudded jointly by local community and Bank Muscat as part of their social responsibilities.

Here are revised sentences, corrected for grammar and wording:

1. "I supervised the construction of the Wadi Bagol Dam in Saham town. The project was designed and consulted by the Ministry of Agriculture, Fisheries Wealth & Water Resources, and funded by the local community in Mahab Village and other donors."

2. "As a volunteer, I supervised the construction of community services, including the Multiuse General Majlis, Mosque, and maintenance of Falajs in the Mahab village."

3. "I participated in the construction of three football pitches for the Mahab Sports and Cultural Team. The project was jointly funded by the local community and Bank Muscat as part of their social responsibilities."
